decisions.title: Authorisation granularity on the IPC socket
pql as supporter tool; clide wraps, never duplicates
Dart core; sidecar dissolved; `ptyc` as pql-peer
Window chrome — native frame vs frameless custom
Extension API shape — widgets, subcommands, both?
Panel manager is kernel; layout is data; three-column is a preset
Coverage gates — hard thresholds vs soft reporting
Kernel admission rule — mandatory shared singletons only
Two-tier disable — kernel locked, everything else extension-shaped
Editor tab — full LSP vs tree-sitter-only highlight
Built-ins in Dart, third-party in sandboxed Lua
Panels are extension-shaped from day one
YAML for themes + manifests; JSON for i18n catalogs
Kernel DB service — namespaced SQL access?
i18n is a Tier-0 contract (fframe pattern + locale-fallback chain)
Pql absorbs planning vs keeps separate
WCAG-AA contrast gate on bundled themes
SSH-remote development — run clide against a remote workspace
Golden tests — primitives only, Alchemist + Ahem
Mocks — mocktail at IO, hand-rolled fakes for ChangeNotifiers
Body text face — mono everywhere vs Josefin Sans UI + mono code
Web driver — raw Playwright + Flutter semantics
Terminal strip scope — shell only or logs/errors/tests
Focus behavior when editor is dirty and viewer is peeked
XWayland fallback for frameless — proper Wayland protocol needed
CI — Gitea primary, Linux-only runners, not yet activated
Golden-output ignore pattern — `coverage.*` excludes output, not scripts
`.claude/` is committed project surface, managed through the IDE
Planning tooling lives in pql, not clide
Claude panes — one primary per repo, tmux-backed
Design handoff — adopt token palettes, reject Material wrapper
Four bundled themes — clide, midnight, paper, terminal
Syntax highlighting tokens in the theme pipeline
Core frame builtins vs shipped extensions boundary
Chrome budget — no tabs, no breadcrumbs, keyboard-first
Editor mode — inline above Claude, viewer swap
Context auto-behavior — right panel reacts to Claude
Claude pane internal tabs for multi-session
Dissolve daemon process; Flutter app hosts IPC server
Frameless custom chrome with per-column 24px hats

tickets.title: validate pql init installation cycle
Tier 0 — app + daemon handshake, empty IDE shell
Tier 1 — Claude in xterm pane, PTY, session persistence
Tier 2 — pane model, editor, active-file awareness, CLI
Tier 3 — git panel, diff tab, clide git CLI
Tier 4 — pql integration: query panel, file tree, backlinks, problems
Tier 5 — canvas and graph view
Tier 6 — extension API, settings, theming, distributable builds
Q&D record system + ADR migration
Python stopgap tooling
pql skill install + stopgap removal
bundled dependency licensing
pql query panel — sidebar tab for vault queries
pql-backed file tree — replace or augment files.ls with pql files
backlinks panel — show inbound links to active file
problems panel — surface pql doctor + validate warnings
add dart doc generation to CI
audit error handling in PTY and IPC critical paths
translate four design themes into YAML theme files
expand SurfaceTokens with syntax highlighting roles
implement welcome screen per hi-fi design
multi-buffer editor tabs
wire command palette keybinding
secondary Claude pane UI wiring
CI reproducible build for libtree-sitter.so
tickets.description: BUILD.md at app/native/linux-x64/ has TODO checklist: build from pinned source SHA in CI, record SHA-256, cross-compile for macOS (aarch64, x86_64) and Windows (x86_64). Currently built on contributor machine.

tickets.title: web-tree-sitter via JS interop for browser builds
tickets.description: Conditional import behind TreeSitterService: native impl uses dart:ffi to libtree-sitter.so, web impl uses dart:js_interop to web-tree-sitter (official emscripten build from tree-sitter org). Same grammar .wasm files on both platforms. Vendor web-tree-sitter .wasm + JS glue as Flutter web assets, pinned version, added to licenses.yaml.

tickets.title: migrate shipped extensions from builtin/ to extensions/ per D-46
tickets.description: D-46 defines the boundary: content extensions (editor, claude, claude-control, markdown, diff, git-ui, pql, canvas, graph, decisions, tickets, todos, problems) move from app/lib/builtin/ to app/lib/extensions/. Incremental — one at a time, each behind a working build. Extension contract must support bundled Dart extension as a first-class category.

tickets.title: feed POLICY.md rules into D-records
tickets.description: POLICY.md (added 2026-04-22) defines rules for: no-network-on-default-launch-path, dependency vetting checklist, vendored binary rebuild process, telemetry prohibition, license compatibility matrix. These need corresponding D-records in decisions/ so the architectural decision trail is complete. Some may overlap with or supersede existing D-records.

tickets.title: editor respects .editorconfig settings
tickets.description: When a file is opened in the editor, read .editorconfig from the workspace root and apply: indent_style, indent_size, max_line_length (ruler/wrap guide), end_of_line, trim_trailing_whitespace, insert_final_newline. Parse the INI format ourselves (small, no dep). Glob matching per the EditorConfig spec.

tickets.title: Implement 12px collapse spine for side panels
tickets.description: Replace current visibility toggle with a 12px spine widget: rotated label, paper-2 bg, inner-edge border, click-to-expand, badge dot with count for pending context.

tickets.title: Implement focus mode (full-window takeover)
tickets.description: Focus mode via double-click header, hover ⛶ glyph, or ⌘. shortcut. Snapshot LayoutArrangement on enter, restore on Esc. Show Esc hint in header.

tickets.title: Persist layout state across sessions
tickets.description: Save collapse state, active sections, pql pane state, editor split ratio, and fuzzy find recent picks to .clide/settings.yaml via SettingsStore. Restore on boot.

tickets.title: Wire canonical keyboard shortcuts from interaction model
tickets.description: Add commands and keybindings: ⌘⇧1/⌘⇧3 collapse, ⌘1/⌘2/⌘3 focus panel, ⌘. focus mode, ⌥1-5 left section switch, ⌘E editor, ⌘W close editor, Esc dismiss.

tickets.title: Add icon rail to right panel (context section switcher)
tickets.description: Right panel currently has no bottom icon rail. Add one matching the left sidebar rail pattern: viewer, pql graph, links, images as section tabs.

tickets.title: Implement editor-above-Claude mode in middle column
tickets.description: ⌘E opens editor above Claude with draggable divider, 30-40% height. ⌘W closes. Viewer ↔ editor swap: ✎ promotes to editor, 👁 demotes to viewer. Prompt bar Y stays fixed.

tickets.title: Context auto-behavior: right panel reacts to Claude references
tickets.description: Parse file references from Claude output. Swap viewer content when right panel is open. Badge on spine when collapsed. Live-sync viewer when editing .md.

tickets.title: Contribute tickets & decisions tabs to sidebar
tickets.description: The decisions and tickets shipped extensions exist as stubs but don't contribute TabContributions to Slots.sidebar yet. Spec lists them as the default left-panel section.

tickets.title: Contribute markdown viewer tab to context panel
tickets.description: The markdown shipped extension exists as a stub but doesn't contribute a TabContribution to Slots.contextPanel. Spec lists viewer as the primary right-panel section.

tickets.title: Contribute graph view tab to context panel
tickets.description: The graph shipped extension exists as a stub but doesn't contribute a TabContribution to Slots.contextPanel. Spec lists pql graph as a right-panel section.

tickets.title: Add PRs tab to sidebar
tickets.description: Spec lists PRs as a left-panel section (icon rail position 5). No extension exists yet.

tickets.title: Add images tab to context panel
tickets.description: Spec lists images as a right-panel section. No extension exists yet.

tickets.title: Decide diff view placement
tickets.description: Diff view currently contributes to workspace. Spec doesn't place it. Likely belongs in context panel (viewer) or as an editor overlay. Depends on Q-27.

tickets.title: Ship clide tmux.conf for Claude pane sessions
tickets.description: Bundle a clide-specific tmux.conf (no status bar, large scrollback, zero escape delay, 256color passthrough). Claude pane spawn passes -f to use it. Includes bottom-anchoring via initial escape sequence or shell profile trick after attach.
